story.text:
# The Grimoire Root

The machine-readable root artifact — the privacymage (First Person) grimoire, **v10.4.0, complete at 31 acts** — is large (~316 KB) and is not inlined here. It is the JSON your agent loads alongside the narrative.

**Local:** `mouse_spellbook/reference/privacymage_grimoire_root.json`

**Hosted canon your agent can read:**
- https://agentprivacy.ai — framework, model, tomes, workshops
- https://spellweb.ai — the knowledge-graph substrate
- https://soulbis.com — the Swordsman’s house, Key, lattice, star
- https://firstperson.network

Your own personal patch is the small, fillable shape in [[Template — Grimoire Version (JSON)]].

———
↑ up: [[The 31 Acts]]

See also: [[Template — Grimoire Version (JSON)]] · [[The 31 Acts]]
